mapper.select:
select id, deal_type, lawd_cd, umd_nm, house_name, house_type, jibun, road_name, build_year, exclusive_area, land_area, deal_year, deal_month, deal_day, deal_amount, deposit, monthly_rent, floor, deal_gbn, raw_xml, created_at from ( select pd.*, row_number() over ( partition by deal_type, lawd_cd, ifnull(umd_nm, ''), ifnull(house_name, ''), ifnull(jibun, ''), ifnull(road_name, ''), ifnull(deal_year, 0), ifnull(deal_month, 0), ifnull(deal_day, 0), ifnull(deal_amount, -1), ifnull(deposit, -1), ifnull(monthly_rent, -1), ifnull(exclusive_area, -1), ifnull(land_area, -1), ifnull(floor, '') order by id desc ) as rn from property_deals pd
deal_type = #{dealType} and lawd_cd = #{lawdCd} and umd_nm like concat('%', #{dong}, '%') and house_name like concat('%', #{houseName}, '%')
and deal_year = cast(substring(#{dealYmd}, 1, 4) as unsigned) and deal_month = cast(substring(#{dealYmd}, 5, 2) as unsigned)
and ( lawd_cd like concat(#{keyword}, '%') or umd_nm like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or house_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or house_type like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or jibun like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or road_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or deal_type like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or case deal_type when 'APT_TRADE' then '아파트 매매' when 'APT_RENT' then '아파트 전월세' when 'RH_TRADE' then '연립다세대 매매' when 'RH_RENT' then '연립다세대 전월세' end like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
) deduped where rn = 1 order by deal_year desc, deal_month desc, deal_day desc, id desc limit 200

select deal_type, count(*) as deal_count, min(deal_amount) as min_deal_amount, round(avg(deal_amount)) as avg_deal_amount, max(deal_amount) as max_deal_amount, round(avg(deposit)) as avg_deposit, round(avg(monthly_rent)) as avg_monthly_rent, round(avg(exclusive_area), 2) as avg_exclusive_area, round(avg(case when deal_amount is not null and exclusive_area is not null and exclusive_area > 0 then deal_amount / exclusive_area end), 2) as avg_price_per_square_meter from property_deals where lawd_cd = #{lawdCd} and deal_year = cast(substring(#{dealYmd}, 1, 4) as unsigned) and deal_month = cast(substring(#{dealYmd}, 5, 2) as unsigned) group by deal_type order by deal_type
